LanguageData.AncientDanger.label: ancient danger
LanguageData.AncientDanger.instruction: write the pawn's immediate foreboding at the ancient wall as one personal moment; keep the danger uncertain and do not reveal what is inside
LanguageData.VoidMonolithDiscovery.label: void monolith discovery
LanguageData.VoidMonolithDiscovery.instruction: write the pawn's first discovery of the void monolith as extreme dark anomaly dread; make the structure feel inhuman and psychic, but keep the moment grounded in what the pawn can see and feel
LanguageData.VoidMonolithActivation.label: void monolith stirring
LanguageData.VoidMonolithActivation.instruction: write the pawn's deliberate first stirring of the void monolith as a threshold crossed; focus on the activator's visible and psychic experience, and do not invent what the monolith will cause next
LanguageData.VoidMonolithWaking.label: void monolith waking
LanguageData.VoidMonolithWaking.instruction: write the pawn's deliberate waking of the void monolith as a second escalation; focus on the activator's visible and psychic experience, and do not invent hidden knowledge or later consequences
LanguageData.VoidMonolithVoidAwakened.label: void awakened
LanguageData.VoidMonolithVoidAwakened.instruction: write the pawn's deliberate awakening of the active void chapter as a final escalation of the monolith; stay with the activator's visible and psychic experience, without claiming either terminal choice or outcome
LanguageData.Birthday.label: birthday
LanguageData.Birthday.instruction: write the pawn's birthday as an uneasy RimWorld milestone, not a celebration; focus on age, fragility, and what another year can cost on the rim
LanguageData.HeartAttack.label: heart attack
LanguageData.HeartAttack.instruction: write the pawn's heart attack as immediate bodily danger; keep it personal, physical, and urgent without inventing treatment outcomes
LanguageData.PrisonBreak.label: prison break
LanguageData.PrisonBreak.instruction: write the colony's reaction to a prison break as sudden danger and alarm; focus on the pawn's position in the colony response, not the prisoners' inner thoughts
LanguageData.MechClusterLanded.label: mech cluster
LanguageData.RoyalAscent.label: Royal Ascent
LanguageData.RoyalAscent.instruction: write the colony's exact decision to undertake the Royal Ascent and the pressure of preparing for imperial hospitality; this accepted quest proves commitment only, so never claim that the Stellarch has arrived, that hosting has begun, or that anyone will escape
LanguageData.MechClusterLanded.instruction: write the pawn seeing dormant war machines assembled on the colony's horizon; cold, patient, and mechanical danger that has not moved yet — write the waiting and the planning, never an invented battle
LanguageData.ShortCircuitAftermath.label: short circuit
LanguageData.SelfTameJoined.label: animal self-tamed
